calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: M. Howard.
Gary Fertig, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness: Linda Seals, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jamal J. Bennette.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $5,183.32
Prejudgment Interest $416.06
Attorney Fees $850.00
Costs $237.50, for a Total of $6,686.88
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2007 Set For Trial On Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
